description: Detects memory mismanagement in C: use-after-free, double free, realloc overwrite (p = realloc(p, n) loses original pointer on failure). Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot track freed variables across statements without cross-statement analysis). Simplified per D-07: match free() calls broadly.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify free() is not called twice on the same pointer (double-free), pointer is not used after free() (use-after-free), and realloc result is stored in a temporary (not the original pointer) to avoid memory loss on failure
